views.name: DashboardView
views.purpose: Central hub showing today's focus progress ring, session count, total focus minutes, current streak, and a quick-add FAB to log a new session

views.name: EntrySheet
views.purpose: Quick entry modal: task name text field, category picker, duration stepper (default 25 min), quality slider, distraction counter, completed toggle, and optional notes

views.name: HistoryView
views.purpose: Chronological list of all focus sessions grouped by date, with category icon badges, duration, quality stars, and distraction count. Filterable by category and completion status

views.name: AnalyticsView
views.purpose: Multi-section analytics: daily focus bar chart (7-day), category breakdown pie chart, peak productivity hours heatmap, weekly trend comparison, focus score gauge, and AI-generated insights

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todaySessionCount
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Number of sessions logged today (both completed and abandoned)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayFocusMinutes
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Total minutes of focus time today from completed sessions only

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayGoalProgress
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Ratio of today's completed sessions to dailySessionGoal (0.0 to 1.0+), drives the progress ring

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyFocusMinutes
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Total focus minutes across the current Mon-Sun week from completed sessions

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklySessionCount
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Number of completed sessions this week

viewModelComputedProperties.name: averageSessionDuration
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Mean duration in minutes across all completed sessions, used for trend insight

viewModelComputedProperties.name: completionRate
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Percentage of sessions marked completed vs total sessions (0-100), measures discipline

viewModelComputedProperties.name: averageQuality
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Mean focus quality rating (1.0-5.0) across all sessions

viewModelComputedProperties.name: averageDistractionsPerSession
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Mean distraction count per session — lower is better, tracked for improvement

viewModelComputedProperties.name: currentStreak
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Consecutive days where user completed at least dailySessionGoal sessions, resets on a missed day

viewModelComputedProperties.name: longestStreak
viewModelComputedProperties.description: All-time longest streak in days for display as personal record

viewModelComputedProperties.name: focusScore
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Composite 0-100 score: weighted formula of completionRate(40%) + avgQuality scaled to 100(30%) + inverse distraction rate(30%)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: peakFocusHour
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Hour of day (0-23) with most completed sessions, used for 'Your most productive hour' insight

viewModelComputedProperties.name: focusMinutesByCategory
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Array of (categoryDisplayName, totalMinutes) pairs for pie chart breakdown

viewModelComputedProperties.name: dailyFocusChartData
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Last 7 days of (date, focusMinutes) tuples for the bar chart

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyTrendDelta
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Percentage change in total focus minutes this week vs previous week. Positive = improvement

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyInsights
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Array of 2-4 generated insight strings based on recent data patterns, e.g. 'Your focus quality peaks in morning sessions'

dailyGoal.description: Number of completed pomodoro sessions per day to maintain streak and show goal progress

defaultSessionDuration.description: Standard pomodoro duration in minutes, pre-filled in entry sheet stepper

domainLogic.streakDefinition: A day counts as active if the user completes at least the dailySessionGoal number of sessions (completed=true). Streak resets if a calendar day passes with fewer completed sessions than the goal. Weekends count — focus is a daily practice.
domainLogic.trendAnalysis: Compare this week's total focus minutes and session count against the previous week. Also track 4-week rolling average of focus quality and distraction count to surface improvement or regression trends.
insights: Peak hour detection: identify the hour with most completed high-quality (>=4) sessions and suggest scheduling deep work then
Category balance: flag if >80% of sessions are one category, suggest diversification
Quality-duration correlation: detect if longer sessions correlate with lower quality, suggest shorter pomodoros
Distraction trend: compare this week's avg distractions vs last week, celebrate improvement or suggest techniques
Completion rate alert: if <70% completion rate this week, suggest reducing session duration to build consistency
Streak motivation: at streak milestones (7, 14, 30 days), surface encouragement messages
Weekly focus time ranking: compare current week to user's personal best week
